description.value:
Frequency once per hour

Trigger You succeed at a saving throw.

You know that nothing in life is guaranteed, and you feel invigorated every time you overcome the challenges life throws at you. You're certain that you'll live to see another day. You gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to your level that last for 1 minute. If you critically succeeded on the triggering save, you are also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Quickened] during your next turn and can use your extra action only to Stride or Strike.
